TRT Evaluation

Lab-driven testosterone evaluation and care

A comprehensive, evaluation-first approach to testosterone care. We start with symptoms and labs — not a sales pitch. If TRT isn't right for you, we'll tell you.

Book a Visit
Our Process

Evaluation before everything

A structured, honest approach to testosterone care that starts with understanding your symptoms and labs.

1

Symptom Evaluation

  • ● Structured review of fatigue, mood changes, libido, and concentration
  • ● Full medical history and current medications assessment
  • ● Open discussion before any decisions are made
2

Lab-Based Assessment

  • ● Testosterone panel: total testosterone, free testosterone, SHBG
  • ● Comprehensive bloodwork including CBC and metabolic panel
  • ● Provider-led results review with clear explanation
3

Monitoring & Adjustments

  • ● Regular follow-up check-ins if TRT is appropriate
  • ● Individualized dose adjustments based on labs and response
  • ● Periodic monitoring labs every 3–6 months
Our Philosophy

Honest evaluation, not a sales funnel

Unlike many TRT clinics, we don't start with the assumption that you need testosterone. We start with your symptoms and your labs. If TRT isn't clinically appropriate, we'll be upfront about it and help you explore other options.

Labs first

Decisions are driven by your bloodwork, not assumptions.

Honest conversation

We'll tell you if TRT isn't the right fit.

Ongoing care

Not a one-visit clinic. We monitor and adjust over time.

Common Questions

What to know

Can TRT be managed via telehealth?
Yes. Symptom evaluation, lab ordering, results review, and ongoing management can all be handled effectively through telehealth visits.
Do you accept insurance for TRT?
No. MBS Medical is a cash-pay practice. This keeps your care simple, private, and free from insurance-driven limitations.
What if I'm not a candidate for TRT?
We'll be upfront about it. If your labs and symptoms don't support TRT, your provider will explain why and discuss alternative approaches to address your concerns.

Start with an evaluation

Get a clear, lab-based picture of where you stand — no pressure, no sales pitch.

Book a Visit
